content.content: Instagram star who is known for her alexandrabull__ Instagram account, which has garnered over 130,000 followers. As a model, she has appeared at New York Fashion Week events as well as events during Los Angeles Fashion Week. She is also an actress who has appeared in shows likeDhar Mannand Badan. She began posting to her Instagram account in early 2013. Her first post is a picture of her wearing the costume of the fictional character Merida from the Pixar filmBrave. She is a former All-Star Cheerleader. She has been a member of the girl group, 101. Her father, Richard Bull, has won two Latin Grammys. In August 2022, she appeared in the music video for the song "Little Kids Nowadays" byBrent Riverafeaturinglivswearingen, who is more widely known as LIV.
